issues.title: Respond to ticket
issues.body: First contact with the scientist to obtain project details and setup a meeting.

issues.title: Design experiment
issues.body: For RNA-seq experiments we need a completed [project proposal document](https://bioinformatics.thecrick.org/babs/working-with-us/completing-a-proposal-document/), [an experiment table](https://bioinformatics.thecrick.org/babs/working-with-us/experiment-table-preparation/) and an [analysis.spec file](https://bioinformatics.thecrick.org/babs/working-in-babs/analysis/desdemona/#desdemona-philosophy) for the statistical analysis. All factors considered during the experimental design process that are important for the analysis and not in the project proposal document should be recorded here.

issues.title: Analysis spec file
issues.body: Write a DESdemonA analysis.spec file that encodes the required statistical comparisons. This file will be used by the RNA-seq preprocessing pipeline

issues.title: BABS Approval
issues.body: Ensure that the work is achievable with the resources we have; and that the PI has approved the initial budget. Assign staff members to the remaining tasks as appropriate.

issues.title: ASF Approval
issues.body: The project has gained ASF committee approval and ASF has opened the project. The project should now have an ASF LIMS project ID (asf-lims-id).
